rows.notes: Both extractors agree on this header. Visual verification confirms.
gpt-5-mini is correct. Visual inspection clearly shows 'Domus', not 'Dorset' (claude-haiku's reading).
gpt-5-mini correctly identified this total row. claude-haiku missed it entirely. Visual verification confirms the text and amounts are clear.

claude-haiku correctly identified 'Braine' as a header/category with no amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged 'Robey' into this description and classified it as an 'entry' without amount. Visual inspection confirms 'Braine' is a standalone header introducing a group of entries.

claude-haiku correctly identified 'Robey' as a separate entry with amount 6.0.0. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged 'Robey' into the 'Braine' line and missed its associated amount. Visual inspection confirms.

Visual inspection identifies the description as 'Hodson'. claude-haiku correctly extracted the amount 3.10.0, although it misread the name as 'Holley'. gpt-5-mini misread the name as 'Hodlor' and completely missed the amount.

Visual inspection confirms description 'Bates' and amount 1.6.0. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the description but missed the amount. claude-haiku misread the description as 'Baker' and misaligned the amount.

Visual inspection confirms description 'Thatching' and amount 1.7.0. Both extractors failed to capture the correct amount for this line. gpt-5-mini missed the amount, while claude-haiku misread the description and amount.

Visual inspection confirms description 'Kid Cottage Comm:n' and amount 1.4.6. Both extractors missed the amount. gpt-5-mini correctly read the description but split 'Comm:n' into a separate, unassociated line (R8). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Red Cottage'.

rows.description: Whitehead Repair of walls Moor Lane
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms description 'Whitehead Repair of walls Moor Lane' and amount 3.2.3. gpt-5-mini correctly read the description but missed the amount. claude-haiku incorrectly split the description and missed the amount.

Visual inspection confirms description 'Gardner Quit Rent Warboro' and amount 1.7.0. gpt-5-mini correctly read the description but missed the amount. claude-haiku misidentified the amount and split the description.

gpt-5-mini is correct on both description 'Faulkner Repairs' and amount (5.2.0). claude-haiku split the description and misread the pounds amount. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.

gpt-5-mini is correct on both description 'Hughes Straw for Thatching Barn' and amount (20.0.0). claude-haiku missed 'Hughes' and misread 'Thatching' as 'Matching'. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.

gpt-5-mini is correct on both description 'Timber Valuation of' and amount (1.0.0). claude-haiku misread 'Timber' as 'Timbler' and split the description. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.
gpt-5-mini is correct on both description 'Denny Pipes' and amount (5.8.0). claude-haiku misread 'Denny' as 'Penne' and split the description. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.

Both extractors correctly identified the amount 4.18.10. gpt-5-mini had a better description 'Gwynne Im Bill', which is very close to 'Gwynne Inn Bill' as visually verified. claude-haiku misread the name and split the description across two rows. I have corrected 'Im' to 'Inn'.

Visual inspection confirms description 'Comm:n' and amount 12.18.4. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amount but incorrectly prefixed the description with 'Gwynne' (which is on the previous line). claude-haiku incorrectly assigned an amount (12.10.4) and classified 'Comm:' as a header, missing the rest of the text and the actual amount for this line.

Visual inspection confirms description 'Stamps & Poles' and amount 0.1.6 (no pounds digit). gpt-5-mini correctly identified the shillings and pence and omitted pounds, though it split the description. claude-haiku misread 'Stamps' as 'Tramps', incorrectly included a pounds amount, and split the description.

gpt-5-mini correctly extracted both the description 'Stone repairs Bampton' and the amount 0.15.6. claude-haiku completely missed this entry, interpreting 'Stone' as a header and misaligning other details. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.
gpt-5-mini is correct on both description 'Clinkard Wheeler' and amount 3.13.5. claude-haiku missed 'Clinkard' and misread pence as 6. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.
Both extractors agree on this entry. Visual verification confirms the text and amounts are clear.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified the full description 'Lovell Hatching Cottages' and accurately extracted the amount 4.0.4 with a 0.5 pence fraction, visible as a trailing loop. claude-haiku misread the description and missed the fraction.
Visual inspection confirms the full description is 'Straw for Pipes'. Both extractors correctly identified the amount 5.5.0 but split the description across multiple rows. I have merged them.
gpt-5-mini correctly identified the description 'Receiving Cottage Rents' and the amount 0.12.6. claude-haiku misread the amount as 13.0.0. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.
Both extractors identified this line as having no amount. gpt-5-mini's description 'Kidlington Estate purchase of' is more accurate. Visual inspection confirms it is a section header, not an entry.

Both extractors correctly identified the amount 8000.0.0. Visual inspection shows the description is 'By sale at L. Tew.'. gpt-5-mini was close but noted '???'. claude-haiku misread the text as 'deleation'. The number '8000' itself is part of the entry, not a separate total column.

Both extractors correctly identified the amount 256.5.8. Visual inspection shows the description is 'Do. Rd 3 per cent'. gpt-5-mini was closer with 'Red 3 per cents'. claude-haiku misread the description as 'Dr. Upstairs'. The amount is part of the entry text.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified the description 'Assumed by Domus' and amount 858.12.4. claude-haiku misread the description, misidentified it as a total, and incorrectly merged the following line's amounts into this one, adding an erroneous fraction. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified this distinct subtotal line with amounts 49.14.18. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this line with the previous one. While 18 pence is an invalid sum in a final accounting, it is clearly transcribed as written on the ledger page, indicating a running subtotal or calculation that hasn't been normalized yet. Confidence is high in the transcription of the digits, and the row type is 'total' as it appears to be a computed figure.

gpt-5-mini accurately extracted both the description and the amount 101.0.0. claude-haiku misread the name ('Drees' instead of 'Jones') and misidentified the amount as an embedded '£247' from the text instead of the column. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.

gpt-5-mini accurately extracted the description and the column amount 87.16.0. claude-haiku misread the name, the embedded amount, and the column amount. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's extraction.
